scripts.build:ui: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:api: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.lint: echo 'linting backend...' && (cd backend && npm run lint) && echo 'linting frontend...' && (cd frontend && npm run lint) && echo '✅ lint passed'
scripts.typecheck: echo 'checking backend...' && (cd backend && npx -y tsc --noEmit) && echo 'checking frontend types...' && (cd frontend && npx -y tsc --noEmit) && echo '✅ types passed'
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && echo '✅ all passed'
